headline: Ralph Lauren Stock Gains 36% in a Year: Time to Buy or Hold?
summary: RL's 36% rally reflects strong brand momentum, DTC gains and Asia growth, but premium valuation and macro risks may favor patience.

raw.headline: Ralph Lauren Stock Gains 36% in a Year: Time to Buy or Hold?
raw.summary: RL's 36% rally reflects strong brand momentum, DTC gains and Asia growth, but premium valuation and macro risks may favor patience.

headline: Ralph Lauren (RL) Joins Russell Defensive Indexes, Is The Stock Still Below Fair Value?
summary: Why Ralph Lauren’s new index roles matter for shareholders Ralph Lauren (RL) has been added to the Russell 1000 Value Defensive Index, the Russell 1000 Growth Defensive Index, and the Russell 1000 Defensive Index, spotlighting the stock within multiple institutional benchmarks. This triple inclusion gives investors a fresh reference point for where Ralph Lauren sits across growth, value, and defensively oriented strategies. It may also influence how some asset managers size or classify...

headline: The Toughest Questions Nike Faced On Its Latest Call
summary: Nike's turnaround is a tale of two businesses, and on its latest call, analysts focused on why the successful half isn't saving the struggling half.
